base_url.description: Akeneo PIM host URL (e.g. https://example.trial.akeneo.cloud). An absolute http(s) URL with a host is required; the connector fails closed otherwise (SSRF guard).

client_id.description: Akeneo OAuth2 API client ID (Basic-auth'd, paired with the client secret, on the token-exchange request only). Matches legacy's own config (non-secret) classification (internal/connectors/akeneo/akeneo.go's cfg.Config["client_id"]) even though it flows into an auth exchange -- never logged regardless.

secret.description: Akeneo OAuth2 API client secret, paired with client_id as HTTP Basic auth on the token-exchange request. Never logged.

api_username.description: Akeneo API user username, sent in the password-grant token-exchange JSON body. Matches legacy's own config (non-secret) classification -- never logged regardless.

password.description: Akeneo API user password, sent in the password-grant token-exchange JSON body. Never logged.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-100, the limit query param).

max_pages.description: Hard cap on the number of pages fetched per stream read. 0 (or unset) means unlimited.
